pi_items.source: task.json metadata field; this is the expected strategy name to be created

NinjaTrader 8 official support forum documentation confirms standard custom strategy path is Documents\NinjaTrader 8\bin\Custom\Strategies; verified via https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/strategy-development/97415-what-is-the-default-location-for-the-strategies-folder
NinjaTrader 8 official documentation confirms EMA is a built-in system indicator method; verified via https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/moving_average_-_exponential_e.htm
NinjaTrader 8 official documentation confirms SMA is a built-in system indicator that should be replaced; verified via https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/moving_average_-_simple_sma.htm

pi_items.verified_value: SampleMACrossover is a documented NinjaTrader 8 example strategy using 10-bar and 25-bar moving average crossover logic
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 documentation and community forums confirm SampleMACrossover is a built-in example strategy using SMA indicators with parameters 10 (fast) and 25 (slow); verified via https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjascript-file-sharing/ninjascript-file-sharing-discussion/1126945-atsquadrostrategybase-nt8-strategy-foundation-with-samplemacrossover

privileged_info_summary: The task requires developing a trading strategy in NinjaTrader 8 by modifying the SampleMACrossover example strategy to use EMA (Exponential Moving Average) instead of SMA (Simple Moving Average). The environment contains real historical market data for SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) spanning 502 trading days from January 3, 2023 through December 31, 2024, with complete OHLCV data in NinjaTrader-compatible format. The custom strategy file will be created at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\bin\Custom\Strategies\SampleEMACrossover.cs. Both EMA and SMA are built-in NinjaTrader 8 indicators. SPY is a real, liquid NYSE-listed ETF tracking the S&P 500 index.
